fields.label: Options (Select newline-list / Link target DocType / Table child DocType / Dynamic Link source field)
fields.rationale: Required whenever fieldtype needs one: Select (newline-separated value list), Link (name of target DocType - not validated at save, fails at render if typo), Table / Table MultiSelect (name of child DocType), Dynamic Link (name of the Link field that holds the target DocType). Empty for other fieldtypes.

fields.label: Insert after fieldname (or 'append')
fields.rationale: Names an existing field on the target DocType; the new field lands immediately after it. Typos silently insert at the end of the form (no error) which confuses users. Verify the target fieldname via lookup_doctype first. Use 'append' only when the placement is genuinely irrelevant.

fields.label: Required
fields.rationale: Required fields on a populated DocType break every existing record and every existing flow (bulk insert, API, imports) unless you also ship a backfill. Default 0; enable with eyes open.

fields.label: Read only
fields.rationale: The field is populated by scripts, hooks, or fetch_from, not the user. Enable when the value is derived.

fields.label: Hidden
fields.rationale: Hidden fields cannot be reqd=1 unless they carry a default (Frappe raises HiddenAndMandatoryWithoutDefaultError). For runtime-only storage, pair hidden=1 + default=''.

fields.label: Default value
fields.rationale: Plain-text default for new records. Not type-validated against fieldtype; setting default='yes' on a Check field silently coerces at render. Empty means no default.

fields.label: Unique
fields.rationale: Unique constraint added to the database column. Only honoured for Data, Link, Read Only, Int fieldtypes - the DocType controller silently drops unique=1 on Text / Long Text / etc. Enable only on fresh fields or after confirming no duplicates in existing data.

fields.label: Show in list view
fields.rationale: Adds a column to list view. Cheap but clutters; enable only when users scan or filter on this value.

fields.label: Filterable in list view
fields.rationale: Exposes a filter control at the top of list view. Pair with in_list_view for discoverability.

fields.label: Fetch from (e.g. 'customer.territory')
fields.rationale: Auto-fetches the value from a linked doc's field. Format: '<link_fieldname>.<target_fieldname>'. Only Link fieldtypes resolve the source; Dynamic Link needs custom handling. Empty means no fetch.

fields.label: Fetch only when empty
fields.rationale: When 1, fetch_from only fires if this field is blank - preserves user overrides. When 0 (default), fetch_from re-fetches on every save, overwriting user input.

fields.label: Visibility expression (JS)
fields.rationale: Client-side JS expression (evaluated against the form doc); when it returns falsy, the field is hidden. Example: eval:doc.customer_type == "Company". Empty means always visible.

fields.label: Mandatory expression (JS)
fields.rationale: Conditional mandatory: when the expression evaluates truthy, the field is required. Example: eval:doc.status == "Approved". Empty means reqd follows the reqd flag above.

fields.label: Read-only expression (JS)
fields.rationale: Conditional read-only: when the expression evaluates truthy, the field becomes read-only. Empty means read_only follows the read_only flag above.

fields.label: Translatable
fields.rationale: Marks the value for Translation lookup. Silently coerced to 0 by the controller unless fieldtype is Data / Select / Text / Small Text / Text Editor.

fields.label: Permission level (0-9)
fields.rationale: Permission level for this field. permlevel > 0 requires at least one DocPerm row at the matching level on the parent DocType, otherwise the field is invisible to everyone. Default 0 is safe.

fields.label: Editable after submit
fields.rationale: When 1 AND the target DocType is is_submittable=1, the field can be edited even after the document is submitted (docstatus=1). Used for fields that legitimately change post-approval (internal notes, tracking IDs, scheduled delivery date). Silently ignored on non-submittable DocTypes.

fields.label: Hide in print
fields.rationale: Excludes the field from print / PDF renders regardless of whether it has a value. Default 0 (visible in print).

fields.label: Exclude from document copy
fields.rationale: When 1, the field is NOT carried when a user duplicates the document via Copy. Use for fields that must be unique per record (reference numbers, serial IDs) or sensitive data that shouldn't silently propagate.

fields.label: Non-negative only
fields.rationale: Only meaningful for Int / Float / Currency fieldtypes. When 1, values below zero are rejected at save. Default 0 (any number). Silently ignored on non-numeric fieldtypes.

fields.label: Decimal precision (0-9)
fields.rationale: Only meaningful for Float / Currency / Percent fieldtypes. Overrides the site-wide default precision (usually 2). Empty means inherit the site default.

fields.label: Virtual (not stored)
fields.rationale: When 1, the field is COMPUTED on read and not stored in the DB - requires a controller hook or a fetch_from to produce the value. Virtual fields cannot be Link or Table fieldtypes, and fieldtype cannot be changed to virtual on a field with existing data. Advanced use; default 0.
